context: Buying clothes is a handful of predictable moments: find your size, try it on, check the price. Learn those and you can shop for anything - we'll teach the names of the clothes you actually wear, nothing else.
explanation: The frame "Tiene esto en...?" (Do you have this in...?) plus your size or a colour covers most of it. Ask "cuanto cuesta?" for the price, "mi talla" for your size, and point to "el probador" (the changing room) to try things on.
